summary: R2 fixes systems_architect REQUEST_CHANGES by adding M6 command authority checks, aligning M6 AI actor IDs with the polity:<id> convention, and replacing the recognized-order obligation dead branch with clear/risk/blocked obligation semantics covered by tests.

tests_run.result: Modified allowed files: packages/sim-core/src/command-query-v1.ts, tests/sim-core-m6-diplomacy-legitimacy.test.ts, tests/sim-ai-m6-diplomacy-ai.test.ts, project/tasks/active/M6-DIPLOMACY-LEGITIMACY-001.json, and this R2 handoff. Untracked ui-samples/ remains untouched.
24 test files passed, 179 tests passed. Added M6 unauthorized actor rejection and recognized-order obligation clear/risk/blocked coverage.
2 test files passed, 3 tests passed. M6 AI test inputs now use actorId polity:2 and submitted AI commands keep actor kind ai with id polity:<actorPolityId>.
Node/Worker-compatible hashes matched for hello, command/query, save/load, M4 replay, and M5 playable loop canaries.
Architecture boundaries passed; determinism passed; root Vitest passed 37 files / 259 tests; web Vitest passed 1 file / 4 tests.
VALID project/tasks/active/M6-DIPLOMACY-LEGITIMACY-001.json after R2 REVIEW status update.
No whitespace errors after R2 task and handoff updates.

decisions: sim.propose-diplomatic-agreement now requires actor authority over proposerPolityId through the existing M3 actorHasPolityAuthority convention.

sim.answer-diplomatic-agreement now requires actor authority over the responding polity, defined as the agreement targetPolityId; system actors retain the existing limited command authority behavior through actorHasPolityAuthority.
sim.record-legitimacy-source is now restricted to explicit M6 domain-authorized system actors: m6-legitimacy, m3.succession, m4.postwar, or m6.validation.
M6 AI tests and usage now follow the existing campaign AI actor convention: actor kind ai with id polity:<actorPolityId>.

M6 recognized-order obligation semantics are defined as clear when relevant creditor obligations are current, risk when obligations are disputed/overdue/in arrears, and blocked when obligations are breached/defaulted; risk or blocked prevents canPursueVictory.
No manual node battle, server/multiplayer, telemetry, arbitrary-code scripting, full peace treaty UI, hidden grand-strategy manager, UI, PROJECT_STATUS.md, or ui-samples/ changes were made.
risks: R4 shared sim command/query behavior still requires systems_architect review.
The M6 domain-authorized system actor allowlist is intentionally narrow and may need later expansion only through explicit reviewed domain commands.
Recognized-order obligation semantics are minimal for M6 substrate: they use existing M3 obligation status/accounting and do not introduce a new obligation manager.
requested_action: Perform R2 systems_architect review focused on M6 actor authority, AI actor ID parity, domain-authorized legitimacy source recording, and obligation-sensitive recognized-order decisions.
